Siblisian Berserker Cloak

Slot: BACK
AC: 9
STR: +9 DEX: +9 STA: +9 AGI: +9 HP: +50
Haste: +26%
WT: 0.1 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

could a lv 49 to low 50ish ranger solo these guys (except trakanon) has stats around 200 cept stamina and has about 3.5k hitpoints
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 18 2004 at 2:40 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Melee can't solo anything, maybe a lvl 65 ranger with defense AAs and full haste and all spells and good weapons but then you wouldn't need the cloak. Casters rule the solo game...
RE: solo
QuoteReply
# Jul 01 2004 at 9:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591803099351
4 posts
Melee cant solo??? Are you feeling ok?? Im a 65 Sk and I solo all over the place.. In natimbi (farming for augs), Fire at tables which is around 16% per kill aa, or if im just bored I go to like PoI, PoD or PoN- not the best exp but real easy and fast.. Yes some forms of casters are better at soloing but thats just because they dont get hit and well they cant get hit cause then theyd be dead.. Saying that only casters can solo and maybe a ranger can solo is just stupid, i dont know what server you play on but obviously its one where ppl have no skill.. BTW, if you think melee cant solo, I soloed Gore and Talendor...
▲ Page top

Edited, Tue Jul 6 06:03:26 2004
▲ Page top
RE: solo
QuoteReply
# May 23 2005 at 12:19 PM Rating: Decent
nyteshayd
View User Forum
Scholar
530 posts
Every class can solo, it's just a matter of figuring out a suitable style.

Warriors can't solo using the same tactics that, say, a mage can because they're not mages.

Up until recently, I had felt that it was impossible to effectively solo as a Ranger. Then I realized that parts for arrows are not expensive, and Root is a good spell to use. On an average kill, I don't even have to engage the mob until it's under 40% life, and there are mobs (ones that actually give XP) I can kill without meleeing.
____________________________
Jiriki Sa`Onserei, 120/67k AA Wood Elf Ranger
Anadriel Starfire, 120/46k AA High Elf Mage

question
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2003 at 1:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593375035899
532 posts
Ok did this item have 30% or 36% haste at one point and then get nerfed down to 26%? I'm asking because on the weekend where they had the GM events that were suppose to be dropping items that no longer drop my monk recieved one of these cloaks. On items like that circle that casts invis in .1 seconds you could tell nerf and prenerf but there would be no way to tell off the bat with a haste item. If anyone knows anything for sure please post...

Bordon (lvl 51 Monk)
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2003 at 9:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758775694
123 posts

▲ Page top
RE: Max haste
QuoteReply
# Aug 08 2003 at 8:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591786367850
66 posts
No, this + AQ will give 90%. You need at least a CoF or better to max haste with AQ
▲ Page top
Haste stacking?
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2003 at 6:35 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593966305246
View User Forum
2 posts
Just ot one tonite. I also got the silvery belt of contention. Just wondering if I wanna keep both cuz I dunno if the effect of the Haste stacks...anyone has infos about it?
▲ Page top
RE: Haste stacking?
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2003 at 1:25 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591785200792
234 posts
No, two item hastes can not stack together. You're only going to benefit from the better haste. You can keep the belt for the stats though.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 07 2002 at 10:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) how do people come up with the numbers like 26% haste and 28% haste?? how. click on the effect above. It says its based on level.
RE: i dont understand
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2003 at 1:25 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593375035899
532 posts
It's an item effect, it doesn't give a crap what level you are. People say recommended level affects the worn effects but I know even that to be total BS as far as I can tell. Anyway the level of haste is set on the item, has nothing to do with who is wearing it...

Liveye (lvl 65 Wizard)
▲ Page top
RE: i dont understand

▲ Page top
RE: i dont understand
QuoteReply
# Nov 11 2002 at 4:29 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592253313557
30 posts
d00d, thats the "spell" haste(the one a caster would cast), evry haste item has a fixed haste, which is why some items are better then others. for instance, SBC is a haste item with 26% haste.

Edited, Thu Apr 24 22:44:32 2003

▲ Page top
Uber Cloak
QuoteReply
# Oct 09 2002 at 1:49 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965791865
View User Forum
47 posts
I just aquired this cloak tonite from an old guildmate who got Earring of Endless Speed recently and was selling this.(thanks Fanlrone) I was previously usin Silver Chitin Handwraps after banking my Hangman's Noose for a quicker haste ratio. I am usin my Siblisian Berserker Cloak with my Eyepatch of Plunder I aquired thru questing a while back and noticed quite a bit more attacks. The arguements of haste percentage aside, I think this cloak is about as good as it can get for a melee short of the super high lvl zones like Vex Thall and TOV. The stats are incredible for melees and I get 100 hps from it after the 9 stamina bonus is added to the 50 hps it has. I will use this cloak if and until I get an upgrade in haste percentage and I will prob still wear this just for the stats. Earring of Endless speed is next on my list. On Vallon you can buy this for half the price of COCW or COF's. My best advice to tanks is take advantage of this cloak if you come across it being auctioned and have the coin. It will not disappoint you in any way.
▲ Page top

#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 20 2002 at 11:16 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) First of all to Mr. Herman Scholar who would be pissed if a light blue had 6 to 8k hps, Try soloing in skyshrine sometime right past the first portal after the huge gate on the way to the maze, yes the named wyverns there are light blue and at times green at 60th level,, they have upwards to 17k hps. so enjoy master soloer. A real monk can solo the blue ones in that zone so give it a shot Pal.

# Feb 06 2002 at 9:44 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591757041680

Locoluk is a lozer. I had to kill him 3 times before he admitted I was stronger. lool. Yeah the SBC does drop randomly. I saw one of a Kor and another off Trak, then yet another off a Krup. I would say the Krup drop is rarer, since we killed about 200 within a month and saw only 1. Haste is now fully tested to be between 28-32 percent. Worth about 15k on TZ.

# Jul 02 2001 at 11:17 AM Rating: Default

1 post
I participated in a GM event in Steamfont on 23 June 2001. I was the only person around when the event started and helpd kill Meldrath for the NPCs. I was called out and awarded this cloak for my services. It is definitely faster than the FBSS I was using.

Gorse Shadowwood
48th Level Ranger
202 Skill Level Fletcher
Tunare server
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 31 2001 at 11:57 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Little newbie liar, GM's wouldn't give something like this away for just killing meldrath the *****, i mean come on, its soo obvious you are lying so go back to killing your large rats and bats newbie.
#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 27 2002 at 10:44 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Edited, Sat Mar 16 10:53:21 2002
RE: GM event
QuoteReply
# Oct 02 2001 at 11:14 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591760098004
18 posts
You are sadly mistaken friend, this cloak has been rewarded at GM events. There was a raid at the west commonlands druid ring of some lvl 50ish Quest characters a few weeks ago. After a long battle and many deaths. This item was dropped by one of them, along with other stuff. So don't go slamming people down. You were not there so how do you know he's lying? Don't hate him for being lucky enough for getting this item and not you. I'm sure you're the kind of person who despises that lvl 30ish guy or gal who got a title for helping Firiona Vie in Lesser Faydark when Cazic Thule came for a visit. Maybe one day you'll be lucky enough to stumble upon an event like this, but I'm sure most of us hope you're on the other side of the world, doing a corpse run into Seb or Lguk.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 05 2001 at 10:07 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You are a total ****** lots of gm events go on server there has been 12 in 1 week on my server before you dont know if he got this there or not so quit acting like the newb you are an just stfu
cloak

This is among the most desirable cloaks for a melee, even more so then CoF, why? Because at 50+ you will hit haste cap with either and this has better stats by far.
